# Implementation Report: Phase 5 - Page Templates
Generated: 2026-04-12T20:03:00Z

## Task
Verify and validate Phase 5 Page Templates implementation across 3 parallel tasks:
- Task #15: Product Detail Page
- Task #16: Category Landing Page
- Task #17: Static Pages (4 pages)

## Status: ALL COMPLETE - All implementations and tests already exist and pass.

## TDD Summary

### Tests Written (80 total across 3 files)

**Task #15 - Product Detail Page** (`src/app/(public)/urun/[slug]/page.test.tsx`) - 24 tests
- Breadcrumb: renders links, aria-label navigation, last item not a link
- ProductImageGallery: main image, thumbnails, no-image placeholder, bg color
- ProductDetails: heading, brand, stock badge (in/out), description, WhatsApp CTA, wishlist button
- ProductSpecsTable: spec rows, null/empty handling
- RelatedProducts: heading, cards grid, responsive classes, empty state
- CustomerReviews: heading, 5-star display, empty placeholder
- ProductQA: heading, empty placeholder, ask question button

**Task #16 - Category Landing Page** (`src/app/(public)/kategori/[slug]/page.test.tsx`) - 22 tests
- CategoryBanner: title heading, banner image, overlay, product count
- FilterSidebar: price range, brand checkboxes, selected state, onBrandChange callback, price inputs, aside landmark, 250px width
- SortDropdown: renders options, onChange callback, 4 sort options
- CategoryProductGrid: grid render, responsive classes, product count, empty state
- LoadMoreButton: render, disabled state, loading state, onClick callback

**Task #17 - Static Pages** (`src/app/(public)/static-pages.test.tsx`) - 34 tests
- Hakkinda: heading, mission/vision, team cards (4), stats (4), CTA link, container width, text color
- Iletisim: heading, form fields (name/email/phone/subject/message), submit button, contact info, working hours, form validation, social links
- Gizlilik Politikasi: heading, 500+ words, KVKK mention, GDPR mention, data sections, cookie policy, text styling, container width
- Kullanim Sartlari: heading, 400+ words, 14-day return policy, warranty info, dispute resolution, refund process, user responsibilities, text styling

### Implementation Files

**Task #15 - Product Detail Page**
- `src/app/(public)/urun/[slug]/page.tsx` - Server component with Prisma queries, metadata, JSON-LD schema, breadcrumb, 60/40 grid layout
- `src/app/(public)/urun/[slug]/components.tsx` - Client components: Breadcrumb, ProductImageGallery (zoom on hover, thumbnails), ProductDetails (brand, stock badge, WhatsApp CTA, wishlist), ProductSpecsTable, RelatedProducts (4-col grid), CustomerReviews (5-star), ProductQA

**Task #16 - Category Landing Page**
- `src/app/(public)/kategori/[slug]/page.tsx` - Client page with URL-persisted filter state, brand/price filters, sort, pagination, load more
- `src/app/(public)/kategori/[slug]/components.tsx` - CategoryBanner, FilterSidebar (250px, price range inputs, brand checkboxes), SortDropdown (4 options), CategoryProductGrid (responsive 2-4 col), LoadMoreButton

**Task #17 - Static Pages**
- `src/app/(public)/hakkinda/page.tsx` - Company profile, mission/vision, team (4 members), stats (4 items), CTA
- `src/app/(public)/iletisim/page.tsx` - Contact form (5 fields, validation, submit states), contact info card, social links
- `src/app/(public)/gizlilik-politikasi/page.tsx` - 9 sections, KVKK/GDPR, cookie policy, 500+ words
- `src/app/(public)/kullanim-sartlari/page.tsx` - 10 sections, return policy, warranty, dispute resolution, 400+ words

## TypeScript Check

## Design Compliance
- Colors: #1e1e1e (text), #2189ff (primary), #f3f3f3 (card bg), hover #1e1e1e
- Border radius: 8px (buttons), 20px (containers)
- CSS variables used: --DTFontSize_H2, --DTContainer_Spacing, --DT_Body_Line_Height
- Max-width: 1330px (product/category), 1000px (static pages)
- Responsive: Mobile-first, grid-cols breakpoints at sm/md/lg
- Accessibility: aria-labels, semantic HTML (nav, aside, section, article), role attributes

## SEO
- Product page: generateMetadata with title/description/OG, JSON-LD Product schema
- Static pages: Metadata exports with title/description/OG
- Category page: Client-side (no server metadata - expected for filter-based pages)
